# Ducke {.unnumbered}

```{r set}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
trees <- readxl::read_xlsx("data/raw_data/ducke/ducke_arvores_20140214_corr_pom_planilha de trabalho.xlsx") %>% 
  select(especie,	numero,	parcela,	x,	y,	lado) %>% 
  rename(species = especie, id = numero, plot = parcela, side = lado) %>% 
  separate(species, c("genus", "species")) %>% 
  filter(!(species %in% c("na", "indet")))
plots <- readxl::read_xls("data/raw_data/ducke/plotsducke_ambientes_completo2.xls", 2)
env <- readxl::read_xlsx("data/raw_data/ducke/Species Weighted Averages.xlsx", 2) %>% 
  select(Especie, hand.mean) %>% 
  rename(species = Especie, hand = hand.mean) %>% 
  separate(species, c("genus", "species")) %>% 
  filter(!(species %in% c("na", "indet")))
```

```{r trees}
#| message: false
#| fig.cap: "Caption."
trees %>% 
  group_by(genus, species) %>% 
  summarise(abundance = n()) %>% 
  arrange(desc(abundance)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(rank = 1:n()) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(rank, abundance)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  scale_x_log10() +
  xlab("Rank") +
  ylab("Abundance")
```

```{r env}
#| message: false
#| fig.cap: "Caption."
trees %>% 
  group_by(genus, species) %>% 
  summarise(abundance = n()) %>% 
  left_join(env) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(hand, abundance)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  xlab("Abundance") +
  ylab("Mean Hieght Above Nearest Drainage [HAND, m]")
```
